item.title: Online C compiler: 7 options to practice C without installing anything
item.description: Practical guide to choose an online C compiler based on your goal: solved practice, quick snippets, or technical interview prep.

item.title: Best books to learn C in 2026: comparison by level and learning style
item.description: Useful comparison of classic and modern C books in 2026 by level, exercises, practical focus, and recommended learning path.

item.title: Is learning C worth it in 2026? Practical decision guide
item.description: Useful guide to decide whether learning C in 2026 is worth it based on real career paths, technical ROI, and a practical study plan.

item.title: C vs Rust vs C++ vs C#: practical comparison to choose in 2026
item.description: Clear comparison of C, Rust, C++, and C# by performance, memory safety, learning curve, and real-world project fit.
